description: UART Transmitter module with integrated 16x8-bit FIFO buffer, configurable frame format via LCR register, and standard UART protocol compliance.

ports.name: PCLK
ports.description: System main clock, all logic triggered on rising edge

ports.name: PWDATA
ports.description: Parallel input data, written to FIFO when tx_fifo_push is high

ports.name: tx_fifo_push
ports.description: FIFO write enable, active high, one clock cycle

ports.name: LCR
ports.description: Line Control Register for frame format configuration

ports.name: enable
ports.description: TX process enable, active high. When low, bit_counter stops, TX pauses

ports.name: tx_fifo_empty
ports.description: FIFO empty flag, high when FIFO has no data

ports.name: tx_fifo_full
ports.description: FIFO full flag, high when FIFO cannot accept new data

ports.name: busy
ports.description: TX busy flag, high during frame transmission (START to last STOP)

ports.name: TXD
ports.description: Serial data output, idle state is high

sub_modules.name: uart_tx_fifo
sub_modules.description: 16x8-bit synchronous FIFO buffer for TX data storage

count.description: Data counter, sole basis for empty/full判断

key_registers.name: bit_counter
key_registers.description: Bit period counter, 0-15 for 16 PCLK cycles per bit

key_registers.name: tx_buffer
key_registers.description: Latched data byte from FIFO for transmission

transitions.IDLE: When FIFO non-empty and enable=1: pop FIFO, latch data, set busy, go to START
transitions.START: TXD=0, count 16 cycles, go to BIT0
transitions.BIT0-BIT7: Send data bits LSB first, TXD=tx_buffer[bit_index], skip unused bits per LCR[1:0]
transitions.PARITY: If LCR[3]=1: calculate and send parity per LCR[5:4], then go to STOP1
transitions.STOP1: TXD=1, mandatory stop bit, if LCR[2]=0 go to IDLE, else go to STOP2
transitions.STOP2: TXD=1, extra stop bit for 1.5/2 stop bits config, go to IDLE

functional_points.name: FIFO write
functional_points.description: Write PWDATA to FIFO when tx_fifo_push=1 and FIFO not full

functional_points.name: FIFO read
functional_points.description: Pop data from FIFO when FSM requests, read-through design

functional_points.name: FIFO concurrent RW
functional_points.description: Simultaneous push and pop: count unchanged, pointers both advance

functional_points.name: IDLE to START
functional_points.description: Detect FIFO non-empty + enable, pop and latch data, enter START

functional_points.name: START bit
functional_points.description: Send low TXD for 16 PCLK cycles

functional_points.name: Data bits LSB
functional_points.description: Send data bits LSB first, 5-8 bits per LCR[1:0]

functional_points.name: Unused bits zero
functional_points.description: Zero unused high bits in tx_buffer before parity calculation

functional_points.name: Parity bit
functional_points.description: Calculate and send parity per LCR[5:4] when LCR[3]=1

functional_points.name: Stop bits
functional_points.description: Send 1 or 1.5/2 stop bits per LCR[2]

functional_points.name: Enable pause
functional_points.description: Pause bit_counter when enable=0, resume when enable=1

functional_points.name: Async reset
functional_points.description: Reset all states, TXD returns to high

functional_points.name: Busy flag
functional_points.description: busy=1 from START to last STOP, busy=0 in IDLE

functional_points.name: TXD idle high
functional_points.description: TXD=1 when idle or in stop bits
